methods.name: Your Song Your Way Rhythm Authentication
methods.description: Two-factor authentication scheme that combines knowledge of a musical rhythm with the biometric characteristics of inputting that rhythm on a multitouch device.
sources: @inproceedings{chenYourSongYour2015, title = {Your Song Your Way: {{Rhythm-based}} Two-Factor Authentication for Multi-Touch Mobile Devices}, booktitle = {2015 {{IEEE Conference}} on {{Computer Communications}} ({{INFOCOM}})}, author = {Chen, Yimin and Sun, Jingchao and Zhang, Rui and Zhang, Yanchao}, year = {2015}, month = apr, pages = {2686--2694}, issn = {0743-166X}, doi = {10.1109/INFOCOM.2015.7218660}}
